title: Rekrap Recreation: Wizard Video
description: A rekreation of Rekrap's multiplayer wizard video.
body:
A rekreation of the modpack RekRap2 used in his youtube video in which he played with his friends in an unknown minecraft modpack. This modpack is by no means 1:1 but has the core mods which he uses and are shown.

This modpack will likely receive updates when needed. Edit: this Modpack is dead as I made it for a server with my friends which is no longer up. However it is still a very fun experience and I hope you enjoy it!

Supplement with Passive Skill Tree and AutoLeveling for more end game content. Also as stated earlier this is by no means 1:1 and is made for PEAK fun and enjoyment. This also has Ars Noveau in it which is another system of magic which was not in his videos but I enjoy hence it is in.
